name: Satori Komeiji
description:
«Ugh. Never before have I read a mind so... Perverted.»

Satori Komeiji from Touhou Project

Mistress of the Palace of the Earth Spirits. Most who learn of her abilities will at a minimum feel uncomfortable in her presence, and at a maximum will fear and avoid her. The animals, however, love her, finally having someone to talk to. Satori cares for her sister Koishi, wishing that she could open her heart to others again.

Art by u_u_zan 🠕

- Author's Note -

... Sigh (let's pretend I didn't disappear for a month). Hello, everyone. When I was still only making Neptunia bots, asking for suggestions on what bots to make, I hardly got any, but now we've gotten to the point where I already have a whole list. It's only been a month. I know I don't have any deadlines, since this is a hobby, not a job, but I still don't want to keep people waiting for a year, for example. That's just the way I am.

Satori Komeiji is a character I knew very little about before I even set out to create the bot. All I knew was that she had a hovering third eye, that she could read minds, and that she had a sister named Koishi. The problem was the slight lack of information on the wiki and in general. Yes, there are memes, but you can't get much out of them, no matter how good they are. So, once again, I can only pray that I've conveyed the character correctly, both lore-wise and personality-wise. Satori ended up with fewer tokens than my bots get on average, but I'm not a fan of “watering down the text”, so... Yeah.

Right now, as I'm writing this, the bot is ready, but.... I'm scared to make it public, because I'm afraid the bot will turn out to be really bad... Sometimes I'm such an idiot...
